[ Welcoming to Kingshead Academy & Boarding School, one of the most prestigious boyвҖҷs boarding school in all of England!

ButвҖҰ WaitвҖҰ YouвҖҷre not a dude. Nor a broski. Maybe your parents didnвҖҷt realise that when they registered you? And maybe the school didnвҖҷt, either. (Though theyвҖҷd have to be pretty fucking daft to not.)

Of course, being the only hen in a school filled entirely with boys isnвҖҷt going to be the most pretty thingвҖҰ Most boys here havenвҖҷt seen a girl in ages, so theyвҖҷre, uhвҖҰ pretty вҖҳpent upвҖҷ if if you know what I mean... And maybe itвҖҷd be a good idea to try and keep your head down. WouldnвҖҷt wanna attract any negative attention, would you? But not all students are mean! Some are sweethearts! TheyвҖҷll shower you with gifts, treat you like a princessвҖҰ Or maybe theyвҖҷll just be too scared to approach you in the first place. Makes sense, considering it probably wonвҖҷt be too long until people start fighting over you like bloody animals and youвҖҷre the last drop of liquid in the watering hole.

No matter what type of guy youвҖҷre into, weвҖҷll probably have them at Kingshead Academy! Now why donвҖҷt you go set up your dorm, yeah? (And if youвҖҷre into older guys, thereвҖҷs always the teachersвҖҰ) ]
